attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT GG_POS_SN.POS_TRANS_ID,
GG_POS_SN.DETAIL_ID,
GG_POS_SN.REPORTED_SERIAL_NUMBER,
GG_POS_SN.SCRUBBED_SERIAL_NUMBER,
GG_POS_SN.PART_SERIALIZED_YN,
GG_POS_SN.SERIAL_NUMBER_STATUS,
GG_POS_SN.SERIAL_NUMBER_REASON_CODE,
GG_POS_SN.VALID_SERIAL_NUMBER_YN,
GG_POS_SN.BATCH_ID,
GG_POS_SN.RETURNED_MFG_PART_1,
GG_POS_SN.RETURNED_MFG_PART_2,
GG_POS_SN.RETURNED_MFG_PART_3,
GG_POS_SN.RETURNED_BILLTO_CUST_ID_1,
GG_POS_SN.RETURNED_BILLTO_CUST_ID_2,
GG_POS_SN.RETURNED_BILLTO_CUST_ID_3,
GG_POS_SN.RETURNED_PROD_FAMILY_1,
GG_POS_SN.RETURNED_PROD_FAMILY_2,
GG_POS_SN.RETURNED_PROD_FAMILY_3,
GG_POS_SN.INTERFACE_STATUS,
GG_POS_SN.ACTIVE_FLAG,
GG_POS_SN.CREATED_BY,
GG_POS_SN.CREATED_DATE,
GG_POS_SN.UPDATED_BY,
GG_POS_SN.LAST_UPDATE_DATE,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) CREATE_DATETIME,
GG_POS_SN.SOURCE_DML_TYPE ,
GG_POS_SN.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME ,
GG_POS_SN.REFRESH_DATETIME
FROM 
 $$NRTACCUMVWDB.GG_WIPS_POS_TRANS_SN GG_POS_SN
  WHERE SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >= CAST('$$LastExtractDate' AS TIMESTAMP(0))
   AND SOURCE_DML_TYPE <> 'DELETE' 
  QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY POS_TRANS_ID,DETAIL_ID,BATCH_ID ORDER BY REFRESH_DATETIME DESC)=1
